trials.drug_regimen: Clopidogrel (300 mg load then 75 mg/d) + Asa (75 mg) x 21 d followed by clopidogrel
Clopidogrel (600 mg load then 75 mg/d) + Asa (50-325 mg/d) x 90 d
Ticagrelor (180 mg load then 90 mg twice daily) + Asa (300-325 mg load then 75-100 mg/d) x 30 d
trials.maintenance_dose: ticagrelor 90 mg twice daily + aspirin 75-100 mg/d

trials.inclusion: AIS (NIHSS <=3) or TIA (ABCD >=4) and CYP2C19 loss-of-function allele
trials.drug_regimen: Ticagrelor (180 mg load then 90 mg twice daily) + Asa (75-300 mg load then 75 mg/d) x 21 d followed by ticagrelor
trials.maintenance_dose: ticagrelor 90 mg twice daily + aspirin 75 mg/d

trials.drug_regimen: Clopidogrel (300 mg load then 75 mg/d) + Asa (100-300 mg load then 100 mg/d) x 21 d followed by clopidogrel

abbreviations.ABCD: Age, Blood Pressure, Clinical Features, Duration (TIA risk score)
abbreviations.CHANCE: Clopidogrel in High-risk patients with Acute Nondisabling Cerebrovascular Events
abbreviations.CHANCE 2: Clopidogrel versus Ticagrelor in High-risk Patients with Acute Nondisabling Cerebrovascular Events
abbreviations.INSPIRES: Innovative Stroke Prevention and Intervention Research Study
abbreviations.NIHSS: National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale
abbreviations.POINT: Platelet-Oriented Inhibition in New TIA and Minor Ischemic Stroke
abbreviations.THALES: Acute Stroke or Transient Ischemic Attack Treated with Ticagrelor and ASA for Prevention of Stroke and Death
